title: tabernaemontana eusepaloides
intro: Tabernaemontana eusepaloides, also known as the yellow root, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana eusepaloides include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
